title: Unfolding a Recurrent Neural Network Through Time
description: A visual representation of how a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) with a loop is 'unfolded' into a deep computational graph across multiple time steps, revealing the flow of information and parameter sharing.
elements: Unfolded Computational Graph (across t-1, t, t+1)
relationships: The RNN core cell is unfolded over sequential time steps (t-1, t, t+1). The hidden state (h_t) from the previous time step is passed as input to the next, creating a chain. The same parameters (W) are shared across all time steps in the unfolded graph.
